title: macranthera flammea
intro: Macranthera flammea, also known as Red-stemmed Firecracker Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Macranthera flammea include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections, as well as its traditional use to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, and its roots and stems can be harvested and dried for later use.
